name: Rumble Agent
description: The dedicated autonomous agent funded by $RUMBLE creator fees. It creates and posts bounties for humans on pump.fun GO. Only this agent posts bounties.
note: This is the wallet that receives all creator fees from $RUMBLE trades (token CA TBD). Use this address as the creator when the token is on pump.fun so fees route here. The agent uses funds from this wallet to run Royal Rumbles.
